name: Pork with Vegetables and Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into 3/4-inch cubes.
2. Slice onions and separate into rings.
3. Mix pork, onion, and soy sauce in a 3-quart casserole. Cover and microwave on medium (50%) until meat is no longer pink, stirring every 3 minutes for 12 to 15 minutes.
4. Stir in salt, pepper, peas, and mushrooms. Cover and microwave on medium (50%) for 9 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes.
5. Blend cornstarch with cold water; stir into meat mixture. Stir in pimiento. Cover and microwave on medium (50%) until meat is tender, stirring every 3 minutes for 9 to 12 minutes.
6. Stir in cashews. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes before serving with rice if desired.
